```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement text classification pipeline"
---
# Text Classification
## Task
Build a text classification pipeline.
## Requirements
1. Preprocess and tokenize text. 2. Select model (transformer, LSTM, or classical ML).
3. Train with class balancing. 4. Evaluate with F1, precision, recall per class.
5. Deploy classification endpoint.
## Constraints
- Handle multi-class and multi-label. Balance classes. Evaluate per-class metrics.
## Success Criteria
- Classifier trained and evaluated. Per-class metrics reported. Deployed as endpoint.
```
